items.description: Optically pure glass blanks cut for inspection lenses, survey arrays, and high-resolution verification displays. Northreach fabricators prize the material for its low distortion and stable performance in extreme cold.
items.name: Precision Optical Glass

items.description: A compact sensor-control board that combines signal conditioning, diagnostics, and modular device connections. It is a standard building block for market lenses, logistics scanners, and environmental monitors.
items.name: Sensor Board

items.description: A refined mineral blend rich in the elements required for advanced optics, processors, and compact sensor assemblies. Supply is tightly controlled because small quantities support several high-value production chains.
items.name: Rare-Earth Concentrate

items.description: A low-expansion ceramic engineered to remain stable under severe temperature changes. It is used in insulated diagnostic tools, thermal barriers, and equipment designed for Northreach's cold industrial zones.
items.name: Cryogenic Ceramic

items.description: A strategic conductor wound into protected spools for efficient power transfer and high-sensitivity instruments. Its demanding production process makes it one of Northreach's most valuable industrial exports.
items.name: Superconductive Filament

items.description: A lightweight biomaterial pressed from cultivated algae into durable sheets and cordage. Yrethian manufacturers use it for filters, protective packaging, and low-mass structural panels.
items.name: Compressed Algae Fiber

items.description: A pressure-stable industrial fluid formulated for hydraulic systems and machinery operating in wet or submerged environments. It protects moving parts from salt intrusion, heat buildup, and heavy-load wear.
items.name: Deepwater Lubricant

items.description: A replaceable mechanical seal set built for pumps, cargo monitors, and maritime tools. Multi-layer gaskets and corrosion-safe fittings keep equipment operational during long coastal and deepwater deployments.
items.name: Marine Seal Assembly

items.description: A high-bond resin that cures reliably in humid, salt-heavy conditions. It is used to seal cargo housings, repair maritime equipment, and protect electronics from water exposure.
items.name: Marine-Grade Resin

items.description: A nickel-rich alloy designed for ports, water systems, and exposed route infrastructure. It trades higher cost for long service life where ordinary metals would rapidly degrade.
items.name: Corrosion-Resistant Alloy

items.description: A reusable heat-transfer compound that moves thermal energy away from processors, cells, and power equipment. It is commonly packed into cooling modules and emergency stabilization kits.
items.name: Thermal Gel

items.description: A compressed carbon material used in battery structures, heat-resistant housings, and lightweight reinforced components. Its strength-to-weight ratio makes it central to Thaloris energy manufacturing.
items.name: High-Density Carbon

items.description: An active control module that monitors temperature and redirects heat before equipment reaches damaging limits. It supports portable power banks, maintenance rigs, and precision instruments.
items.name: Thermal Regulator

items.description: A strategic reactive membrane used to accelerate energy conversion and industrial filtration. Even minor contamination can ruin a batch, so intact sheets command a significant premium.
items.name: Catalytic Membrane

items.description: Battery-grade lithium compound processed for energy cells, capacitor banks, and portable power systems. Demand rises sharply whenever transport or grid reliability deteriorates.
items.name: Lithium Salt

items.description: A lightweight aluminum stock certified for precision frames, navigation consoles, and research equipment. Solvend mills control impurities closely so finished parts remain dependable under vibration and rapid temperature change.
items.name: Orbital-Grade Aluminum

items.description: A layered structural composite that combines low mass with exceptional rigidity. It is used in portable research systems, navigation housings, and field equipment that cannot afford excess weight.
items.name: Aerospace Composite

items.description: A dense flexible polymer formulated to protect sensitive electronics and field instruments from radiation exposure. It can be molded into secure enclosures without the weight of traditional shielding.
items.name: Radiation-Shielding Polymer

items.description: A calibrated instrument module containing precision timing, signal processing, and protected measurement interfaces. It turns a basic field terminal into a dependable scientific or verification tool.
items.name: Research Instrument Core

items.description: A laboratory-grown substrate used in high-precision processors, verification equipment, and experimental instrument cores. Minute lattice defects can invalidate the material, making certified pieces scarce.
items.name: Research Crystal Substrate

items.description: A tamper-evident data material used in encrypted chips, audit equipment, and high-trust transaction hardware. Its layered conductive structure makes unauthorized physical modification easy to detect.
items.name: Secure Ledger Substrate

items.description: A durable credential laminate built to hold secure printing, embedded verification marks, and authentication circuitry. It is used in permit cards, access credentials, and regulated equipment records.
items.name: Identity Laminate

items.description: A fine conductive mesh installed around secure housings and contract-verification equipment. Cutting, drilling, or peeling the material breaks its monitored circuit pattern and exposes interference.
items.name: Anti-Tamper Mesh

items.description: A hardened storage and processing module designed for confidential financial, identity, and contract data. It supports secure terminals while limiting exposure if the device is removed or intercepted.
items.name: Encrypted Data Chip

items.description: Ultra-thin gold conductor supplied for high-reliability contacts, secure processors, and precision financial hardware. It is expensive, but it resists oxidation and maintains stable signal paths.
items.name: Conductive Gold Foil

items.description: A fast-curing sealant that forces water away from joints, housings, and emergency repairs. It is inexpensive, portable, and widely used to keep field equipment operational during storms and floods.
items.name: Hydrophobic Sealant

items.description: Porous ceramic pellets engineered to trap sediment and support chemical treatment inside compact filtration systems. Cartridges packed with the media are easy to service and transport.
items.name: Ceramic Filter Media

items.description: A transparent reinforced panel that combines visibility with impact resistance. It is used for inspection windows, protected displays, and infrastructure modules exposed to debris or pressure changes.
items.name: Structural Glass Composite

items.description: A high-grade membrane that removes fine contaminants from water-analysis and purification systems. Properly stored sheets are critical to public-health and environmental response work.
items.name: Filtration Membrane

items.description: A compact pump module for water equipment, emergency infrastructure, and filtration loops. Standardized fittings allow crews to replace a failed unit without rebuilding the entire system.
items.name: Pump Assembly

items.description: A stable transparent sheet made for long-lived records, field documents, and public information displays. It resists moisture, tearing, and discoloration better than ordinary paper.
items.name: Archival Polymer Sheet

items.description: A sound-control fiber used in communication panels, translation devices, and public-information equipment. The material reduces mechanical noise while keeping portable systems light.
items.name: Acoustic Fiber

items.description: A flexible technical fabric that changes tension across its weave to protect tools and organize field kits. It is lightweight enough for portable work while resisting repeated abrasion.
items.name: Adaptive Textile Mesh

items.description: A thin programmable display material used for learning interfaces, public briefings, and portable contract tools. It can present changing diagrams and instructions without a rigid screen.
items.name: Educational Display Film

items.description: A compact interface core that powers interactive training tools, research terminals, and public briefing stations. It combines touch input, accessible feedback, and local content storage.
items.name: Learning Interface Module

items.description: A standardized collection of bolts, clamps, anchors, and locking hardware used across repair and fabrication work. The broad compatibility makes it a dependable input for emergency maintenance.
items.name: Universal Fastener Set

items.description: A high-load fluid formulated for actuators, maintenance rigs, and construction machinery. It maintains pressure under heat and protects pumps and valves from internal wear.
items.name: Hydraulic Fluid

items.description: A powdered and liquid additive package that improves concrete strength, curing control, and resistance to cracking. It is essential for fast infrastructure repairs and field supports.
items.name: Reinforced Concrete Additive

items.description: Dense steel stock prepared for cutting into machine parts, fabricator frames, and warehouse hardware. Its predictable composition reduces tool wear and production defects.
items.name: Machine Steel Billet

items.description: Pre-hardened rings and races used to manufacture replacement bearings for motors, fabricators, and warehouse systems. Keeping this stock available prevents small failures from stopping entire production lines.
items.name: Industrial Bearing Stock

items.description: Upgraded ore with most waste rock removed, ready for efficient smelting into steel. It is a foundational Dravenlok export and a common starting point for heavy-industry supply chains.
items.name: Iron Ore Concentrate

items.description: A uniform metal ingot blended for equipment frames, repair kits, and industrial fabrication. Its certified composition gives builders more reliable strength than mixed scrap.
items.name: Refined Alloy Ingot

items.description: Heat-treated plate designed for structural scanners, maintenance rigs, and heavy protective housings. It is difficult to machine but withstands severe impact and repeated load cycles.
items.name: Hardened Steel Plate

items.description: A high-carbon industrial feedstock optimized for foundry heat, structural reinforcement, and high-temperature processing. It burns and reacts more consistently than untreated coke.
items.name: Industrial Coke Composite

items.description: A field-ready package of braces, plates, anchors, and joining hardware for urgent structural repairs. Crews use it to stabilize warehouses, equipment mounts, and damaged infrastructure.
items.name: Structural Reinforcement Kit

items.description: A high-bandwidth optical fiber designed for public information systems, emergency receivers, and communication arrays. It carries dense signals over long routes with minimal loss.
items.name: Broadcast Fiber

items.description: A strategic optical layer that controls and redirects light inside advanced displays, verification tools, and broadcast equipment. Clean film is difficult to manufacture and easily damaged by contamination.
items.name: Photonic Film

items.description: High-purity silicon wafers selected for communication processors, verification terminals, and signal-control hardware. Stable electrical behavior makes it more valuable than general electronic feedstock.
items.name: Signal-Grade Silicon

items.description: A precision crystal lattice used in secure communication and data-protection equipment. Its physical structure supports unique signal behavior that is difficult to duplicate or intercept.
items.name: Encryption Crystal Matrix

items.description: A controlled technical authorization package for constructing hardened communication equipment. It contains validated layouts, component requirements, and security procedures rather than physical hardware.
items.name: Secure Communications Blueprint
